name: ontology-atlas-mcp
description: MCP server — humans and AI agents read/write the same codebase ontology vault. Current surface: 24 tools (16 read + 8 write).

scripts.test:all: node --test src/parser.test.mjs src/query.test.mjs src/validate.test.mjs src/vault.test.mjs src/redirect-backlinks.test.mjs src/conflict-detection.test.mjs src/analyze.test.mjs src/infer-imports.test.mjs src/reconcile-imports.test.mjs src/detect-drift.test.mjs src/evidence-rank.test.mjs src/ontology-atlas-ignore.test.mjs src/compiled-cache.test.mjs src/ontology-compiler.test.mjs src/ontology-engine.test.mjs src/suggestions.test.mjs src/json-rpc-lines.test.mjs src/verify-script.test.mjs src/integration.test.mjs
